nasb.text: They pledged to put away their wives, and being guilty, they offered a ram of the flock for their offense.

esv.text: They pledged themselves to put away their wives, and their guilt offering was a ram of the flock for their guilt.

cnv.text: 他們舉手起誓要送走他們的妻子，並獻贖罪祭。他們就獻上一隻公綿羊，作他們的贖罪祭。

ccb.text: 他们答应休掉自己的妻子，并从羊群中献上一只公绵羊为自己赎罪。
